title: Add the ability to create subitems from the table widget, in the item page
excerpt:
Description: 
Enable users to create subitems directly from the table widget within an item’s page. 
Significance: 
Improves Workflow Efficiency – Reduces the need to navigate to different views to add subitems.

posts.author: SivanO (Sivan Orren)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description:

Enable users to create subitems directly from the table widget within an item’s page.

Significance:

Improves Workflow Efficiency – Reduces the need to navigate to different views to add subitems.
